column2: A clean Google Sheets/Excel-ready toolkit for MLBB coaches, analysts, and team managers to track scrims, review draft trends, and evaluate player usage in one place.

• MLBB coaches
• team analysts
• amateur / semi-pro teams
• academy teams
• creators selling ready-made analyst templates

1. Update team name and roster in SETTINGS.
2. Input each scrim game in SCRIM_INPUT.
3. Review summaries in DASHBOARD, HERO_ANALYTICS, and PLAYER_OVERVIEW.
Duplicate the master file before selling to each buyer. Keep formulas untouched. Replace demo team identity with your own branding or your client's team name.
The first 5 rows in SCRIM_INPUT contain sample data so charts work immediately. Clear those rows before delivering to a buyer, or keep them as sample data in your storefront preview.
START_HERE, SETTINGS, SCRIM_INPUT, HERO_LIBRARY, HERO_ANALYTICS, PLAYER_OVERVIEW, DASHBOARD

column1: Seller note: this workbook is intentionally built as a template. Buyers can rename sheets, extend hero lists, or duplicate the input tab for multiple events / patches.
